temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a hand holding a black ID card in a clear plastic sleeve. The card features a photo of a man, the name "WONG ONG..." in both English and Chinese, and the word "WANTED" printed above the photo. The background is dark and out of focus. In the top left corner of the frame, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The audio consists of a low, suspenseful, and slightly melancholic instrumental track. The music is atmospheric and creates a sense of tension and seriousness, fitting for a dramatic or investigative scene. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects present. The camera cuts to a medium close-up of a man in a light blue collared shirt and a dark tie. He has a serious and focused expression as he looks down, seemingly examining something just out of frame. The background consists of horizontal window blinds. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The man then turns his head slightly to his right, his expression shifting to one of concern or contemplation as he looks off-camera. The shot remains a medium close-up, with the blinds still visible in the background.
